people.name: Sarah Chen
people.title: VP of Strategy
people.bio: Sarah joined the company 4 years ago from McKinsey. She drives annual planning and cross-functional alignment. Known for being data-driven and direct — she expects presenters to lead with numbers.
people.notes: Prefers concise updates. Dislikes when people come to meetings unprepared. Strong interest in the enterprise segment push.

people.name: James Okafor
people.title: Senior Account Executive
people.bio: James has been in the role for 2 years. Consistently top-10 in quota attainment. Currently managing 14 enterprise accounts.
people.notes: Mentioned feeling stretched last week. Has a deal with Northstar Inc. closing end of month. Committed to 2 closes this month — check in on progress.

people.name: Priya Nair
people.title: Engineering Manager
people.bio: Priya leads a team of 8 engineers. She joined 18 months ago from a fintech startup. Strong systems thinker, advocates strongly for reducing tech debt.
people.notes: Currently concerned about the Redis migration risk. Good relationship — tends to be collaborative and transparent about blockers.

people.name: Morgan Lee
people.title: Sales Director
people.bio: Morgan is the sales lead at DataSync Pro. Has been in the data infrastructure space for 8 years.
people.notes: First time meeting. They sent a proposal last week — pricing was higher than expected. Worth asking about volume discounts and implementation support.

people.name: Alex Kumar
people.title: Solutions Engineer
people.bio: Alex handles technical deep-dives for DataSync Pro prospects. Likely to run the product demo.
people.notes: Technical contact — good person to ask about compliance certifications and real-time latency benchmarks.
